title: Back Cover
description: Closing slide with thank you message, contact info, or next steps

sections.message: Closing message — 'Thank you', 'Questions?', or a call-to-action relevant to the presentation goal
sections.contact: Optional contact info or follow-up details

qualityRules: Back cover is always the last slide — never place body slides after it
If the presentation has action items, summarize them here instead of a generic 'Thank you'
All text uses Roboto font family, DS Kit tokens for colors
